name: Richard Blumenthal
stanceSummary: Track AIPAC reports an Israel Lobby Total of $1,673,548 for Richard Blumenthal in U.S. Senate, CT. Public statements and congressional records indicate an Israel-focused security policy posture in recent conflict framing. This candidate has taken funding from the Israel lobby.
